message:
Make syslog parsing lenient for long SD names (#5922)

Accept syslog messages whose structured-data parameter names exceed the
RFC 5424 32-character limit. This fixes TNZ-462 and keeps vendor-emitted
messages parseable in both `parse_syslog()` and `read_syslog`.

### Review

- The behavior change is intentionally narrow: only the parameter-name
length cap was removed.
- Existing character restrictions and all other syslog field limits stay
unchanged.
- Added regression coverage for both public parsing surfaces.

### Details

<details>
<summary>🧪 Testing</summary>

- `scripts/build.sh`
- `PATH="$PWD/build/xcode/release/bin:$PATH" uvx tenzir-test --root
test-legacy --match tests/functions/parse_syslog --debug`
- `PATH="$PWD/build/xcode/release/bin:$PATH" uvx tenzir-test --root
test-legacy --match tests/operators/read_syslog --debug`

</details>

<details>
<summary>📌 References</summary>

- TNZ-462

</details>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+---
+title: Support long syslog structured-data parameter names
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+created: 2026-03-19T06:47:04.188426Z
+---
+
+The `read_syslog` operator and `parse_syslog` function now accept RFC 5424 structured-data parameter names longer than 32 characters, which some vendors emit despite the specification limit.
+
+For example, this message now parses successfully instead of being rejected:
+
+```text
+<134>1 2026-03-18T11:00:51.194137+01:00 HOSTNAME abc 9043 23003147 [F5@12276 thx_f5_for_ignoring_the_32_char_limit_in_structured_data="thx"] broken example
+```
+
+This improves interoperability with vendor syslog implementations that exceed the RFC limit for structured-data parameter names.

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  x: {
+    facility: 16,
+    severity: 6,
+    version: 1,
+    timestamp: 2026-03-18T10:00:51.194137Z,
+    hostname: "HOSTNAME",
+    app_name: "abc",
+    process_id: "9043",
+    message_id: "23003147",
+    structured_data: {
+      "F5@12276": {
+        thx_f5_for_ignoring_the_32_char_limit_in_structured_data: "thx",
+      },
+    },
+    message: "broken example",
+  },
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  facility: 16,
+  severity: 6,
+  version: 1,
+  timestamp: 2026-03-18T10:00:51.194137Z,
+  hostname: "HOSTNAME",
+  app_name: "abc",
+  process_id: "9043",
+  message_id: "23003147",
+  structured_data: {
+    "F5@12276": {
+      thx_f5_for_ignoring_the_32_char_limit_in_structured_data: "thx",
+    },
+  },
+  message: "broken example",
+}
